name: Fang Dong
title: Ph.D. in Computer Science, Fudan University

publications.title: Oracle-MoE: Locality-preserving Routing in the Oracle Space
Once Read is Enough: Domain-specific Pretraining-free Language Models
SD-MoE: Spectral Decomposition for Effective Expert Specialization
Multi-Head Attention as a Source of Catastrophic Forgetting in MoE Transformers
Metis: Training LLMs with FP4 Quantization
Spectra: Rethinking Optimizers for LLMs Under Spectral Anisotropy

experience.title: Research Intern
experience.summary: Implemented neural architecture search algorithms in NNI and adapted training workflows for multi-GPU PyTorch settings.

experience.title: Memory-friendly MoE architecture
experience.summary: Validated Oracle-MoE on industrial-scale training data and studied memory-efficient MoE structures under large-model pretraining settings.

experience.title: Dynamic expert loading for MoE inference
experience.summary: Designed lightweight cross-layer expert activation predictors to prefetch only activated experts, reducing memory demand for on-device MoE inference.

experience.title: Semantic quantization error modeling
experience.summary: Analyzed quantization sensitivity from the spectral perspective and explored dynamic mixed-precision strategies for balancing latency and quality.
